div.p: Write-Ahead Logging: Transaction API → Recovery Pipeline

ul.li: LSN as file offset: O(1) record lookup
prev_lsn chain: Undo traversal within transaction
rec_lsn: Redo starting point per page

g.text: Milestone 1 Entry point for all transaction operations
write_txn(mgr, txn, page, off, old, new)
Milestone 1 Discriminated union by type field
Milestone 2 Append-only writes LSN = file offset
Milestone 2 Bounded files Rotation at threshold
Milestone 3 Scan from checkpoint Identify active txns
Milestone 3 min_rec_lsn → end Idempotent via pageLSN
Milestone 3 Roll back ACTIVE txns CLRs enable crash-safety
write_clr(log, txn_id, page, off, undo_data, undo_next)
1. segment.end_lsn < min_rec_lsn 2. No active txn firstLSN in range
Milestone 4 Reclaim disk space Bound recovery time
Determines redo start point min(rec_lsn) across all entries
Idempotency check: if page_lsn >= record_lsn, skip
